description: The neutronics behavior of fission reactors, both from a theoretical and computational multi-group perspective. Multi-group diffusion theory, finite-difference and nodal methods, core heterogeneous effects, pin power reconstruction, thermal neutron spectra, fine group whole spectrum calculations and coarse group constant generation.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: N E 405, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: N E 405, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
